categories.name: Strategy Games
categories.content: Strategy game is a video game genre where players engage in planning, resource management, and decision-making to achieve specific objectives.

categories.name: Pump.fun Creator
categories.content: Pump.fun creator tokens are Solana-based memecoins tied to influencers, blending streaming culture with DeFi.

categories.name: Pump Fund Portfolio
categories.content: Projects and tokens officially backed by Pump Fund, the venture arm of Pump.fun. These projects are selected for their adherence to "build in public" principles, transparent development, and verified founder commitment.

categories.name: Securitize Ecosystem
categories.content: The Securitize Ecosystem encompasses tokenized real-world assets (RWAs) issued, managed, or custodied by Securitize, Inc. and its international affiliates.

categories.name: BONK.fun Ecosystem
categories.content: LetsBONK.fun Ecosystem consists of tokens launched via letsbonk.fun.

categories.name: TimeFi
categories.content: TimeFi is a blockchain-based approach to treating time as a monetizable asset through tokenized productivity, verifiable commitments, and AI-driven incentives.

categories.name: Liquid Staking Governance Tokens
categories.content: Liquid Staking Governance Tokens facilitate decision-making and policy formation in Liquid Staking Token Protocols, allowing holders to influence asset allocation and platform strategy.

categories.name: Inscriptions
categories.content: Inscriptions are metadata added to units of cryptocurrencies

categories.name: Regenerative Finance (ReFi)
categories.content: Regenerative finance (ReFi) aims to create economic systems that go beyond generating financial returns to focus on restoring and enhancing social, environmental, and economic well-being.

categories.name: Liquid Staking
categories.content: Liquid staking is a process in which users can stake their cryptocurrency tokens to earn rewards while maintaining the ability to use or trade those tokens in DeFi applications.

categories.name: TokenSets Ecosystem
categories.content: Interconnected platforms and services built around TokenSets.

categories.name: bStocks Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized representations of U.S.-listed stocks and ETFs issued by BTech Holdings Limited, a Binance Group affiliate structured as a Special Purpose Vehicle in the Abu Dhabi Global Market.

categories.name: ST0x Ecosystem
categories.content: Tokenized public equities and capital market instruments issued on the st0x.io platform.

categories.name: America.fun Launchpad
categories.content: America.fun is the first USD1-native launchpad on Solana, designed to build a secure, 'American Dream' themed ecosystem for fair-launch tokens.

categories.name: ERC20i
categories.content: ERC20i is a token standard on Base blockchain that extends the capabilities of ERC-20 tokens by adding native inscriptions.

categories.name: Optimism Superchain Ecosystem
categories.content: The Optimism Superchain is a unified network of chains built using the open-source OP Stack. This framework provides a standardized, modular architectural framework for creating Layer 2 chains that share a common security and communication layer.

categories.name: InfoFi
categories.content: InfoFi combines blockchain and AI to monetise and trade attention, influence, and data as assets. It uses decentralised platforms to aggregate, verify, and distribute information, enabling users to be rewarded from their engagement or content.

categories.name: Midas Liquid Yield Tokens
categories.content: Midas Liquid Yield Tokens refer to liquid yield tokens issued by Midas and offered on https://midas.app/.

categories.name: Binance Buildkey TGE
categories.content: The BuildKey TGE Model is a hybrid Token Generation Event (TGE) framework developed by Aspecta in collaboration with Binance Wallet.

categories.name: Leveraged Token
categories.content: Leveraged crypto token is a type of financial instrument hat allows traders to amplify their exposure to the price movements of an underlying cryptocurrency.
